## Test plan

- [ ] Added or updated tests where appropriate
- [ ] Ran `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] Reviewed and accepted intentional snapshot changes with `cargo insta review`
- [ ] Updated documentation for user-facing changes
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)

## Notes for reviewers

Call out breaking changes, generated-code churn, release considerations, or
